ce4a1b8f72.note: Caused 1 false positive today (QHBI5LNs6ZW5QNHXg17U, OBB, fbc click ~12h before stamp - genuinely fresh). Verified by re-running the B6 query with the corrected POSIX bracket; QHBI5L dropped out cleanly and 8vi0K's fbc_click_at now resolves to 2026-05-24 13:30 UTC (confirming it as a real stale-fbc B6 candidate).
